cover: System architecture diagram: 'Data 360 Zero Copy Federation for Snowflake and BigQuery'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Data 360 Zero Copy: Snowflake + BigQuery Without ETL'. Subtitle 'Federated data access, identity mapping, activation, and Agentforce grounding'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Enterprise Warehouses' pastel blue: modules 'Snowflake Customer 360 Tables', 'BigQuery Product Events', 'Governed Views'. LAYER 2 'Data 360 Federation' pastel green: modules 'Zero Copy Connections', 'Unified Catalog', 'Identity Resolution', 'Native Vector Search'. LAYER 3 'Salesforce Consumption' pastel purple: modules 'Sales Cloud', 'Service Cloud', 'Agentforce 2.0', 'GraphQL API v64.0'. Central node 'Data 360 Metadata + Policy Layer' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER upper right: 'MuleSoft API-to-MCP' and 'Retriever API'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Governance Controls': sub-modules 'User Mode Access', 'Row Policies', 'Audit + Lineage' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Zero Copy Federation Contract Design'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Zero Copy Federation Contract Design'. Subtitle 'Do not connect Data 360 to raw warehouse tables'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Stable Contract with shield icon', 'Freshness Metadata with clock icon', 'Policy Boundary with lock icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'RAW TABLE FEDERATION' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOVERNED VIEW FEDERATION' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: SELECT * FROM EDW.CUSTOMER_DIM; right column green border '// GOOD' code: CREATE SECURE VIEW CRM_FEDERATION.V_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_PROFILE AS SELECT ACCOUNT_ID, MASTER_CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_TIER, UPDATED_AT FROM EDW.CUSTOMER_DIM WHERE IS_DELETED = FALSE;. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Expose only contract fields', 'Include UPDATED_AT', 'Keep source ownership'. Footer bar: 'Zero Copy removes pipelines — not data modeling'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Federated Query Scale Patterns'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Federated Query Scale Patterns'. Subtitle 'What works at 1K breaks at 10M'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K: Contracts First with document icon', '100K: Cache + Monitor with dashboard icon', '10M: Aggregate + Partition with database icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'UNBOUNDED QUERY' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'PARTITIONED AGGREGATE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: SELECT customer_id, event_name, event_timestamp FROM product_analytics.events WHERE account_id = :accountId; right column green border '// GOOD' code: SELECT account_id, COUNTIF(event_name = 'login') AS login_count_30d, MAX(event_timestamp) AS last_activity_at FROM product_analytics.events WHERE event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY account_id;. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Push filters down', 'Avoid raw event federation', 'Expose CRM-ready signals'. Footer bar: 'Federation is not a license for unlimited live queries'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
